item.name: Jon Michael Bonnesen
item.description: Since 2017, Jon has dedicated his legal career to managing a high-volume civil litigation caseload. He is actively involved in every stage of the litigation process, including client intake, filings, discovery, hearings, trials, and strategic settlement negotiations. Known for his practical approach and strong advocacy, Jon consistently achieves favorable outcomes for his clients.

item.name: Halston T. Davis
item.description: Since 2004, Hal has helped hundreds of injured workers secure the compensation they need to recover and return to work. He dedicates 100% of his practice to workers’ compensation, including litigation to challenge denied benefits and fight insurance companies on behalf of his clients.

item.name: Mark J. Sanchez
item.description: Mark has specialized in Utah workers’ compensation law since 2007 and advocates for injured Spanish-speaking clients. He and his staff speak fluent Spanish, helping ensure clients can communicate clearly throughout the legal process.

item.name: Mark Talley
item.description: Mark began working in workers’ compensation law in 2018 as a paralegal with Just Work Comp Law. He developed strong skills in case management, client communication, and case detail. In 2024, he earned his law degree and joined the firm as an attorney, where he is fully dedicated to helping clients maximize their cases.

item.name: Jared Mortensen
item.description: Jared has practiced law since 2008 and now focuses exclusively on workers’ compensation. He helps injured workers challenge denied benefits and pursue the support they deserve.

item.name: Blair Jones
item.description: Blair dedicates 100% of his practice to helping injured workers and is known for achieving strong results against insurance companies and defense counsel. He has represented clients in complex workers’ compensation matters, as well as in criminal defense and protective services cases involving children and parents.
